ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., APEI) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the dividend belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is recorded */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock starts trading ex-dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is paid */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the split belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock split is recorded */,
  "ex_split_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock starts trading ex-split */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Consumer Services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Other Consumer Services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange (e.g., New York) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the stock exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "trading_day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading day entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the trading day belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the day is a holiday */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the exchange is open on the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_days_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the event is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., quarterly earnings release) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
